data.body: OpenCode HTTP turns using openrouter/moonshotai/kimi-k2.6 correctly emit session.idle, but Foolery keeps the process watchdog active after turn_ended and later overwrites the successful turn with timeout when the OpenCode server stays alive or emits post-idle bus noise. Implement a fix so session.idle/session.status idle remains the turn boundary, post-idle OpenCode cleanup noise cannot re-arm turn liveness, and cleanup/reaping cannot reclassify a completed turn as failure. Validate with focused regression tests plus lint/typecheck/test/build.
data.title: Fix OpenCode HTTP idle cleanup watchdog
